zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Beeston於1327年出生在英國爾貝斯頓時，他的父親Lord Henry de Beeston37歲，母親Ellen36歲。他於大約1340年與Matilda Thornton在英國英格蘭爾貝斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1395年2月14日在英國英格蘭爾貝斯頓享年68歲，埋葬在英國爾貝斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Beeston于1327年出生在英国爾貝斯頓时，他的父亲Lord Henry de Beeston37岁，母亲Ellen36岁。他于大约1340年与Matilda Thornton在英国英格兰爾貝斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1395年2月14日在英国英格兰爾貝斯頓享年68岁，埋葬在英国爾貝斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beeston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of the many places in England so called. Those in Nottinghamshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire were settlements where bent grass grew (Old English bēos ‘rough grass’ + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’). In Bedfordshire it probably denoted a settlement on a bend (Old English byge + genitive singular -es + tūn). The hamlet stands on a marked bend of the river Yvel. In Cheshire it is named from a rock, below which trading took place (Old English byge ‘commerce’ + Old English stān ‘stone’). The reference is to a prominent crag where the remains of Beeston Castle stand. Compare Beaston and Beeson .
occasionally a topographic name for someone who lived in that part of a village known in Middle English as bi este toun ‘(place) at the east (end) of the village’.

variants.name: Beston
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston   and   Beaston  .

variants.name: Beeson
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston  , a habitational name from a place called Beeston. The spelling reflects the local pronunciation of the Nottinghamshire placename, although this form is now quite widespread in England.

variants.name: Beaston
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston   (the more common form of the surname in England), a habitational name from any of various places called Beeston.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Beeston was born in 1327, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, his father, Lord Henry de Beeston, was 37 and his mother, Ellen, was 36. He married Matilda Thornton about 1340, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 14 February 1395, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Beeston, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Beeston est né en 1327, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Henry de Beeston, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ellen, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Thornton environ 1340, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 14 février 1395, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Beeston 1327 in Beeston, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Henry de Beeston 37 und seine Mutter Ellen 36. Er hat um 1340 in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Thornton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 14. Februar 1395 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Beeston, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beeston è nato il nel 1327 nel Beeston, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Henry de Beeston, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Ellen, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Thornton circa 1340, nel Beeston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 14 febbraio 1395, nel Beeston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Beeston, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Beestonが1327年にイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンで生まれた時，父Lord Henry de Beestonは37歳，母Ellenは36歳であった。約1340年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンでMatilda Thorntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1395年2月14日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンで68歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアビーストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Beeston(이)가 1327년 영국 체실르 브이스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Henry de Beeston(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브이스턴에서 Matilda Thornton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1395년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브이스턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 브이스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beeston nasceu em 1327, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Henry de Beeston, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Ellen, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Thornton aproximadamente 1340, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1395, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Beeston родился в 1327 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Henry de Beeston было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Thornton около 1340 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 14 февраля 1395 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности бистон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Beeston nació en 1327, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Henry de Beeston, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Ellen, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Matilda Thornton aproximadamente 1340, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1395, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
